product.name: Structured Leather Bag
product.description: Hand-stitched by artisans in Florence, this structured tote is designed to be a lifetime companion. Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather that develops a rich patina over years of use.
details: Interior: two slip pockets, one zip pocket
product.care: Condition regularly with leather cream. Avoid prolonged exposure to moisture. Store stuffed in dust bag.

related.name: Cashmere Scarf
related.description: Woven from Grade A Mongolian cashmere, this scarf is impossibly light yet remarkably warm. A quiet gesture of quality that becomes more treasured with every wearing.
related.care: Hand wash gently in lukewarm water. Never wring. Dry flat on a towel.

related.name: Heritage Linen Jacket
related.description: Crafted from premium Belgian linen, this jacket embodies understated elegance. The relaxed silhouette and natural texture speak to a philosophy of quiet luxury—clothing that improves with age and wears its history beautifully.
details: Two patch pockets, single button closure
related.care: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Lay flat to dry. Iron on low heat while slightly damp.

related.name: Relaxed Merino Sweater
related.description: Spun from extra-fine merino wool, this sweater offers incomparable softness against the skin. The dropped shoulders and easy fit create an effortless silhouette that transitions seamlessly from home to street.
related.care: Hand wash in cool water with wool detergent. Dry flat away from direct sunlight.
